_comment: Pre-biopsy diagnostic profile: incidental 3.2 cm RUL lung_mass on chest CT in heavy smoker, no histology yet. Engine should match WORKUP-SUSPECTED-NSCLC and emit a Diagnostic Brief, NOT a Treatment Plan (CHARTER §15.2 C7).

suspicion.presentation: 67M, 30 pack-year smoker (quit 2 years ago), incidentally found lung_mass 3.2 cm in right upper lobe on chest CT done for persistent_cough x 8 weeks. No hemoptysis. Reports unexplained_weight_loss_with_lung_finding (5 kg / 3 months). No paraneoplastic_syndrome on review. No new_clubbing. Right hilar lymphadenopathy 1.5 cm short-axis on CT; mediastinal stations 4R borderline 1.1 cm. No malignant_pleural_effusion.
